pi_items.source: WebFetch - confirmed URL returns HTTP 200, contains 1000 books across 50 pages
Domain extracted from target_url and verified via HTTP requests
Tested against actual UPC data from books.toscrape.com: a897fe39b1053632, 90fa61229261140a, 6957f44c3847a760 - all match pattern
books.toscrape.com contains 1000 total books (50 pages x 20 books/page), each with UPC and review count data; extracting 15 is feasible
Valid absolute path; setup_task.sh creates this directory at line 32

privileged_info_summary: The task targets books.toscrape.com, a legitimate public practice website maintained by Scrapinghub containing 1000 books. Each book page contains real UPC codes in the format [a-f0-9]{16} (e.g., a897fe39b1053632) and review count data. The minimum extraction target of 15 rows is feasible given 1000 available books. The export directory /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports is properly created by the setup script.
